Here is a natural language paragraph summarizing the key data points:

DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has secured $8.5M in Series A funding, valuing the company at $42M. With a team of 18 people, DataFlow AI is generating $120K in monthly recurring revenue (MRR), growing at a rate of 25% month-over-month. The investment round was backed by prominent investors Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC).
